step.name: detect-trigger
step.action: Confirm target hardware named explicitly; record device, OS, modalities, sensors.

step.name: audit-fallback-tiers
step.action: Verify three-tier fallback per surface; flag single-modality dependencies.

step.name: budget-inference
step.action: Measure p95 latency on target device for each real-time path; reject anything ≥20 ms.

step.name: audit-privacy
step.action: Confirm consent + retention + data-minimisation per stream; document DPIA outcomes.

step.name: run-xaur-gap
step.action: Run XAUR gap-analysis prompt; cross-check every clause verbatim against W3C source.

step.name: human-signoff
step.action: Schedule on-device session with at least one user with relevant disability; block release until logged.
